story.title: The Rival at Iron Hill
story.premise: Iron Hill is a frontier mining camp where two prospectors stake the same claim. Kael, your rival, has been sabotaging your operation and turning the camp against you. Today the claim boss will award the deed to whoever proves themselves — by talk or by force.
story.opening: You arrive at the Iron Hill camp at dawn. Kael is already at the saloon, working the room. The claim boss will make her decision by sundown. You have one day to win the camp's respect and face your rival.
story.currentObjective: Win the camp's respect, confront Kael, and claim the deed before the rival turns everyone against you.
mysteries: Who has been stealing ore from your sluice box?
Why is Kael so desperate to win this claim?
What will the claim boss do if neither of you backs down?
beats: Marta needs help with a collapsed shaft before she'll vouch for you.
Kael is spreading rumors that you cut his rope line.
The claim boss will only respect strength — a spar or a showdown.
If Kael turns enough of the camp, you lose by default.

appearance.outfit: dusty canvas jacket with a copper pick pin

rules.text: The camp respects deeds over words. Help people, win a spar, and the camp leans your way.
Kael's pressure rises every tick he's unopposed. If it maxes, the camp turns against you and you lose.
The claim boss awards the deed at sundown to whoever has more camp respect — or whoever wins the showdown.

tensions.title: Two prospectors, one claim
tensions.summary: Kael and the Prospector both staked the Iron Hill claim. The boss decides today.

tensions.title: Marta's shaft collapsed
tensions.summary: The north shaft caved in. Marta needs help clearing it or she can't vouch for anyone.

villainPlans.title: Turn the camp against the rival
villainPlans.objective: Spread enough rumors and win enough allies that the claim boss hands the deed to Kael by sundown.
villainPlans.nextTrigger: Every tick without opposition, Kael's pressure rises by 10. At 100, you lose.
knownFacts: The claim boss watches both of you

pendingReveals: Kael was seen near your sluice box last night.

visual.description: A wooden arch marks the entrance to Iron Hill camp. Ore carts track the dust.
A weathered saloon with a brass bell and a long bar. Where the camp gathers to talk and fight.
A collapsed mine shaft with timber props and scattered ore. Marta is working to clear it.
Your sluice box by the creek. Someone has been stealing ore from it at night.
A small wooden office where the claim boss keeps the deeds. She watches both prospectors.

items.name: Stolen ore pouch
items.description: A pouch of copper ore that was taken from your sluice box. Found near Kael's bunk.

items.name: Marta's digging tools
items.description: Heavy tools Marta needs to clear the collapsed shaft.

interactables.name: Brass Bell
interactables.description: Ring the bell to challenge Kael to a public showdown.

interactables.name: Deed Box
interactables.description: The claim deed is inside. The boss opens it at sundown for the winner.

npcs.name: Kael
npcs.description: A lean, sharp-eyed prospector who staked the same claim you did. He's been turning the camp against you with rumors and sabotage. Desperate to win because he's in debt.

appearance.hair: greasy black hair under a wide hat
appearance.outfit: black vest over a red shirt, leather chaps, spurred boots
appearance.silhouette: Lean gunslinger silhouette with hat brim and spurred boots.

traits.speechStyle: smooth talker with a sharp edge

goals: win the Iron Hill claim by sundown
turn the camp against the rival prospector

ambitions.title: Turn the camp against the rival

memories.text: I staked this claim first. The rival is an interloper.
I took ore from the sluice box last night. No one saw me.
The claim boss watches both of us. I need to look like the stronger prospector.

moves.name: Dirt Kick
moves.telegraph: Kael kicks dust at your eyes

rumors.text: Kael was seen near the sluice box after midnight.
Kael owes money to someone outside the camp.

npcs.name: Marta
npcs.description: A stocky, practical miner whose shaft collapsed. She'll vouch for whoever helps her clear it. Respects hard work over sweet talk.

appearance.hair: gray-streaked hair in a tight bun
appearance.outfit: canvas work shirt, heavy belt, mining boots
appearance.silhouette: Stocky miner silhouette with heavy belt and boots.

flaws: stubborn once she picks a side
fears: the shaft collapsing again with someone inside

goals: figure out who is stealing ore
back the prospector who helps the camp

memories.text: The north shaft caved in yesterday. I need help clearing it.
Someone has been taking ore from the sluice boxes at night.

npcs.name: Claim Boss Verna
npcs.description: The claim boss who decides who gets the deed. She watches both prospectors and respects strength and fairness equally.

appearance.outfit: dark coat with a brass badge, leather gloves
appearance.silhouette: Tall authority silhouette with brass badge and gloves.

flaws: won't intervene until someone proves themselves
fears: awarding the claim to a coward

goals: award the claim to the stronger prospector

memories.text: Two prospectors staked the same claim. I will decide today.
Kael seems too eager. I will watch him carefully.

quests.title: Help Marta clear the collapsed shaft
quests.description: Marta's north shaft caved in. Bring her the digging tools from the saloon and help clear the rubble. She'll vouch for you with the camp.

quests.title: Expose Kael's ore theft
quests.description: Find the stolen ore pouch in the saloon and bring it to the claim boss. Proving Kael is a thief will swing the camp against him.

quests.title: Challenge Kael to a showdown
quests.description: Ring the brass bell at the saloon to challenge Kael publicly. Win the spar and the camp will respect you. Lose and Kael takes the claim.

eventLog.text: You arrive at Iron Hill at dawn. Kael is already at the saloon.
The claim boss will decide at sundown. You have one day.
